name: Hot Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the bones from the chicken wings and discard any tips.
2. Place the wings in a baking pan and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 1 hour, or until cooked through.
3. In a separate bowl, combine butter and all hot sauces. Heat over low heat until the butter is melted.
4. Keep the sauce mixture warm.
5. Remove the wings from the oven and dip each one individually in the sauce.
6. Place the coated wings in a serving dish.
7. Pour any remaining sauce over the top of the wings.
8. Store leftover sauce in the refrigerator for future use.
Note: You can choose your own hot sauces and adjust the amounts to suit your taste preferences. Be sure to use Crystal hot sauce as one of the ingredients, and adjust the other sauces accordingly. This recipe is quite spicy but also very flavorful!
